CVE-2021-39241.title: An issue was discovered in HAProxy 2.0 before 2.0.24, 2.2 before  ...
CVE-2021-39241.description: An issue was discovered in HAProxy 2.0 before 2.0.24, 2.2 before 2.2.16, 2.3 before 2.3.13, and 2.4 before 2.4.3. An HTTP method name may contain a space followed by the name of a protected resource. It is possible that a server would interpret this as a request for that protected resource, such as in the "GET /admin? HTTP/1.1 /static/images HTTP/1.1" example.

CVE-2021-40346.title: An integer overflow exists in HAProxy 2.0 through 2.5 in htx_add_ ...
CVE-2021-40346.description: An integer overflow exists in HAProxy 2.0 through 2.5 in htx_add_header that can be exploited to perform an HTTP request smuggling attack, allowing an attacker to bypass all configured http-request HAProxy ACLs and possibly other ACLs.

CVE-2022-0711.title: A flaw was found in the way HAProxy processed HTTP responses cont ...
CVE-2022-0711.description: A flaw was found in the way HAProxy processed HTTP responses containing the "Set-Cookie2" header. This flaw could allow an attacker to send crafted HTTP response packets which lead to an infinite loop, eventually resulting in a denial of service condition. The highest threat from this vulnerability is availability.

CVE-2023-0056.title: An uncontrolled resource consumption vulnerability was discovered ...
CVE-2023-0056.description: An uncontrolled resource consumption vulnerability was discovered in HAProxy which could crash the service. This issue could allow an authenticated remote attacker to run a specially crafted malicious server in an OpenShift cluster. The biggest impact is to availability.

CVE-2023-0836.title: An information leak vulnerability was discovered in HAProxy 2.1,  ...
CVE-2023-0836.description: An information leak vulnerability was discovered in HAProxy 2.1, 2.2 before 2.2.27, 2.3, 2.4 before 2.4.21, 2.5 before 2.5.11, 2.6 before 2.6.8, 2.7 before 2.7.1. There are 5 bytes left uninitialized in the connection buffer when encoding the FCGI_BEGIN_REQUEST record. Sensitive data may be disclosed to configured FastCGI backends in an unexpected way.

CVE-2023-25725.title: HAProxy before 2.7.3 may allow a bypass of access control because ...
CVE-2023-25725.description: HAProxy before 2.7.3 may allow a bypass of access control because HTTP/1 headers are inadvertently lost in some situations, aka "request smuggling." The HTTP header parsers in HAProxy may accept empty header field names, which could be used to truncate the list of HTTP headers and thus make some headers disappear after being parsed and processed for HTTP/1.0 and HTTP/1.1. For HTTP/2 and HTTP/3, the impact is limited because the headers disappear before being parsed and processed, as if they had not been sent by the client. The fixed versions are 2.7.3, 2.6.9, 2.5.12, 2.4.22, 2.2.29, and 2.0.31.

CVE-2023-40225.title: HAProxy through 2.0.32, 2.1.x and 2.2.x through 2.2.30, 2.3.x and ...
CVE-2023-40225.description: HAProxy through 2.0.32, 2.1.x and 2.2.x through 2.2.30, 2.3.x and 2.4.x through 2.4.23, 2.5.x and 2.6.x before 2.6.15, 2.7.x before 2.7.10, and 2.8.x before 2.8.2 forwards empty Content-Length headers, violating RFC 9110 section 8.6. In uncommon cases, an HTTP/1 server behind HAProxy may interpret the payload as an extra request.

CVE-2023-45539.title: HAProxy before 2.8.2 accepts # as part of the URI component, whic ...
CVE-2023-45539.description: HAProxy before 2.8.2 accepts # as part of the URI component, which might allow remote attackers to obtain sensitive information or have unspecified other impact upon misinterpretation of a path_end rule, such as routing index.html#.png to a static server.

CVE-2024-53008.title: Inconsistent interpretation of HTTP requests ('HTTP Request/Respo ...
CVE-2024-53008.description: Inconsistent interpretation of HTTP requests ('HTTP Request/Response Smuggling') issue exists in HAProxy. If this vulnerability is exploited,  a remote attacker may access a path that is restricted by ACL (Access Control List) set on the product. As a result, the attacker may obtain sensitive information.

CVE-2025-11230.title: Inefficient algorithm complexity in mjson in HAProxy allows remot ...
CVE-2025-11230.description: Inefficient algorithm complexity in mjson in HAProxy allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service via specially crafted JSON requests.

CVE-2025-32464.title: HAProxy 2.2 through 3.1.6, in certain uncommon configurations, ha ...
CVE-2025-32464.description: HAProxy 2.2 through 3.1.6, in certain uncommon configurations, has a sample_conv_regsub heap-based buffer overflow because of mishandling of the replacement of multiple short patterns with a longer one.
